titleStmt.title: SII 38.119: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 119. (A.R. No. 119 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall, central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Rājakēsarivarman alias Kulōttuṅgachōḷa I Year 30: 1100 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription begins with the meykīrtti of the ruler, Pugaḻmādu-viḷaṅga.

It records a gift of ninety sheep by Peṟṟānmūvarmudalān alias Jñānamūtti Paṇḍitan alias Madhurāntaka Brahmādhirājan, an army general (sēnapatikaḷ), (a native) of Nālūr in Chōḻa-maṇḍalam, who belonged to Vatsa-gōtra, for burning a perpetual lamp to the god of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr in Puḻal-nāḍu in Rājēndrachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu (a sub division) of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam. It is also stated that this lamp was instituted for the merit of the king, Kulōttuṅgachōḻa. Four shepherds residing at Tribhuvanasundara-chēri (a street) in Tiruvoṟṟiyūr received the sheep and agreed to measure an uḻakku of ghee daily by the measure Arumoḻidēvan with the temple servants.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka ja
yamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmaka
ḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟan=ta maṇimuṭi cūṭi
mīnivarRead as minavarnilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara ye
nai mannavariḻiya lūṟṟiḻi tarat tikkanaittu
tan cakkaranaṭātti virasiṁhāsanattu pu
vanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷiya
kovirājakecaripanmarānacakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulottu
ṅka coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu muppatāvatu jayaṅko
ṇṭacoḻamiṇṭalattuRead as jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattuIrājendracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu puḻa
l nāṭṭut tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyārkku cakkaravarttikaḷ śrī
kulottuṅkacoḻadevarkku sonapatikaḷ coḻama
ṇṭalattu nālūr vatsakottirattu peṟṟān muvar mutalā
na ñānamūtti paṇṭitanāna maturān=takabrahmādirājan vai
tta tirunan=tā viḷakkonṟu Ivviḷakkonṟum Erippataṟku
vaitta cāvāmuvāp perāṭu toṇṇūṟu toṇṇūṟuṅ
kaiykkoṇṭom Ivvūrt tiripuvanacun=taracceri maṉṟāṭikaḷil mu
ntai cuppiramaṇṇiyanāna nāṟpatteṇṇāyirakkoṉum vai
ykun=tan celvanāna tirucciṟṟampalakkoṉum Oṟṟiyūran Oṟṟiko
ṇṭānāna poṟkoyiṟcoḻakkoṉum ninaiñcanRead as niṟaiñcantoṇanāna
kāraṇai viṭaṅkakkoṉum Innālvom nāḷ Onṟiṉukku ney Aru
moḻi(y)tevanāl Uḻakkākat tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyār devar
kanmikaḷ vacam Aḷakkakaṭavomānom .
Digital edition of SII 38.119 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
